Container.Name: paperless-telegram-bot
Container.Overview: Telegram bot for managing your Paperless-NGX document archive. Upload documents by sending files or photos, search your archive, tag documents, and organize your inbox — all from Telegram without accessing the web UI. [br][br] Features health check endpoint, user whitelisting, and auto-detection of inbox tags. [br][br] [b]Requires a running Paperless-NGX instance and a Telegram bot token.[/b] [br][br] More info: https://github.com/GeiserX/paperless-telegram-bot
Container.ExtraSearchTerms: paperless document telegram bot upload search archive
Container.Requires: Paperless-NGX instance and Telegram bot token from @BotFather

Config.Name: Allowed Users
Config.Description: Comma-separated Telegram user IDs (empty = open access)

Config.Name: Public URL
Config.Description: User-facing Paperless URL for clickable links (defaults to PAPERLESS_URL)
